pageContext.name: Snow White Apple Scene
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are excited to present the Snow White Apple Scene Figurine from Jim Shore's Disney Traditions collection!  The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. Framed within a halved apple, this bewitching forest scene gathers all the characters of the 1937 Disney classic, Snow White. Snow White smiles alongside the seven dwarfs unaware of the dangers surrounding her while the Evil Queen plots with poison in this Jim Shore creation.   Disney collectibles fans, don't miss your chance to add this Snow White figurine to your Disney collection!
